## React Vite Frontend Project Setup

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - React 18+ with TypeScript
  - Vite as build tool
  - Fetch API for backend communication
  - Minimal state management (React Context)
  - MVP pages: Profile, Job List, Job Detail

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Vite React TypeScript template scaffolded
  - Dependencies installed with npm

- [ ] Customize the Project
  - Create page components (Profile, JobList, JobDetail)
  - Set up routing with React Router
  - Create API service layer for backend calls
  - Add CSS for minimal styling

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - Skip: No specific extensions required beyond Vite defaults

- [x] Compile the Project
  - Run `npm run build` and verify no errors ✅ Build successful (193.35 kB gzipped)
  - Verify dev server starts with `npm run dev`

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - Created tasks.json for dev server and build commands

- [ ] Launch the Project
  - Start dev server and verify React app loads

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - Update README.md with setup instructions
  - Verify .github/copilot-instructions.md is clean
